name: Saajan Ghar
overview: Pooja, an orphan, enters a traditional joint family where values, expectations, and emotions run deep. Vivaan is calm, responsible, and guided by family ideals, while Kabir is impulsive, intense, and driven by unspoken feelings. As love, guilt, and sacrifice collide, Pooja finds herself torn between duty and desire. Will love find the right path, or break the family apart?

trailers.title: Saajan Ghar | Official Promo Launch | Dekhiye Mon Se Sat, Raat 9:30 PM, Sirf #DangalTV Par !
